typography.primary_font_usage: Headings, hero text, numbers (e.g., match percentages). Banned: Inter, Roboto.
typography.secondary_font_usage: Body copy, labels, navigation, UI elements.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl font-serif tracking-tighter leading-none text-neutral-900
hierarchy.overline: text-xs font-sans uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-semibold text-neutral-500

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Neo-minimalism. Generous white space (p-8 to p-16). Avoid cramped UI.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento-style modular layouts for dashboards and galleries. Asymmetry for marketing pages.
layout_and_spacing.borders_and_radius: Sharp edges. Use rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px) for an architectural feel.
layout_and_spacing.shadows: Minimal. Use 1px borders instead of shadows for definition. If shadow is needed: shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)]

components.buttons: Flat, sharp edges. Primary: bg-neutral-900 text-white hover:bg-neutral-800. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-neutral-300 text-neutral-900 hover:border-neutral-900.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI base. Customize to have rounded-none, border-neutral-300, focus:border-neutral-900 focus:ring-0. Large tap targets (h-12).
components.cards: bg-white border border-neutral-200 rounded-none p-6 or p-8.
components.navigation: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-neutral-200. Links must be visible on desktop.
components.ai_match_badge: Subtle luxury. bg-[#F9F6F0] text-[#8C7A6B] border border-[#EADDD0] px-3 py-1 text-sm font-sans uppercase tracking-widest.
components.proposal_comparison: Side-by-side bento layout. 1px borders dividing columns. Highlight recommended options with a subtle gold_leaf top border.
components.messaging: Minimalist threaded view. Avoid colorful bubbles. Use clean lines, text-left alignment, and timestamp overlines.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Opacity fades on images (hover:opacity-90). Subtle border color shifts.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Fade in with slight upward translation (framer-motion).

hero_background.description: Minimalist high-end contemporary art gallery space with dramatic abstract painting.

texture_background.description: Macro photography of thick oil paint texture.

testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layout (hero, bento grids) to achieve asymmetry.
Use Shadcn UI for complex interactives (Forms, Modals, Tabs, Dropdowns) but HEAVILY CUSTOMIZE them to remove radius and match the luxury border style.
For the hero section, use max overlay opacity of bg-white/30 or a gradient overlay so the hero_gallery_space image is highly visible.
Ensure headings use Cormorant Garamond with tight tracking. Never use Inter for headings.
Install and configure Cormorant Garamond and Outfit fonts via Google Fonts in index.css.
Build a multi-step intake wizard using smooth transitions between steps. No generic progress bars; use minimal text steps (e.g., '01 / 05').
In dashboards, stick to a tight grid with sharp 1px borders. Do not overuse drop shadows.
